cache_entries.cached_response: Visiting hours are 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM and 4:00 PM to 7:00 PM daily. Only 2 visitors are allowed per patient at a time.
The billing counter is located on the Ground Floor, near the main entrance. It is open 24/7 for emergency billing.

cache_entries.original_query: How do I reschedule my appointment?
cache_entries.cached_response: To reschedule an appointment, please call 1800-123-4567 or visit the reception desk. Rescheduling must be done at least 24 hours before the scheduled time.
Yes, Emergency Services are available 24/7 at Gate 1. Ambulance services can be reached at 108 or our hospital number 040-1234-5678.

cache_entries.original_query: What documents are needed for insurance?
cache_entries.cached_response: For insurance claims, please carry: (1) Valid ID Proof, (2) Insurance Policy Card, (3) Doctor's Prescription, (4) Previous Medical Records.
